title: Filtering by creation date?
excerpt: Hello, is it possible to create a filter (for a dashboard) based on creation date? For example, I have a “Leads” board and I’d like to be able to put up a Numbers widget to show how many new leads were started each month…

posts.author: TheBox (Mark )
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello, is it possible to create a filter (for a dashboard) based on creation date? For example, I have a “Leads” board and I’d like to be able to put up a Numbers widget to show how many new leads were started each month. When I try to filter the “Creation Date” it seems the only option is to choose which person created it.

I’m sure there is an easy way of doing this but I’m just not finding it.

Thank you!

posts.author: mark.anley (Green Llamas Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @TheBox - there are limitations to where and how the creation date column can be used (filtering, automations, etc.). What we tend to do is just create a new Date column (you can call it Creation Date or alike) and have an automation set: When item created set Creation Date to current date. Then you can utilize it in Dashboards, etc…

Thanks
Mark

posts.author: TheBox (Mark )
posts.cookedHtml: This is perfect! Thanks so much for the help
